changeSet.author: druchniewicz
changeSet.comment: Normalize blank inventory level identifiers to NULL so they don't collide under the unique constraint
changeSet.sql: UPDATE inventory_level SET identifier = NULL WHERE identifier IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(identifier) = ''

changeSet.author: druchniewicz

not.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT identifier FROM inventory_level WHERE identifier IS NOT NULL GROUP BY identifier HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ) duplicates

changeSet.comment: Resolve existing duplicate (non-null) identifiers before adding the unique constraint, so the migration doesn't fail on databases that still have duplicates
changeSet.sql: UPDATE inventory_level original_level JOIN ( SELECT id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY identifier ORDER BY id) AS row_number_within_duplicate_group FROM inventory_level WHERE identifier IS NOT NULL ) level_with_row_numbers ON original_level.id = level_with_row_numbers.id SET original_level.identifier = CONCAT( original_level.identifier, '-', LPAD(FLOOR(RAND() * 1000), 3, '0'), CHAR(65 + FLOOR(RAND() * 26)), CHAR(65 + FLOOR(RAND() * 26)), CHAR(65 + FLOOR(RAND() * 26)) ) WHERE level_with_row_numbers.row_number_within_duplicate_group > 1
